task_completion.description: Verify that 'Golden Gate Bridge' is entered into the search or destination field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Golden Gate Bridge' is visible in the search bar or destination input area of the navigation app.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Golden Gate Bridge is selected as the target destination.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A pin, marker, or location details panel for the Golden Gate Bridge in San Francisco is displayed on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that a route has been calculated and displayed on the map.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A highlighted route line (e.g., blue path) is drawn on the map leading to the Golden Gate Bridge, typically accompanied by ETA and distance information.

task_completion.description: Verify that the route simulation or demo mode option is accessed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A menu, popup, or settings panel showing options like 'Route Demonstration', 'Simulate Route', or 'Demo Mode' is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that the route simulation is actively running.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The app is in active navigation view with visual indicators of a simulation, such as simulation playback controls (play/pause/stop/speed multiplier buttons), a 'Simulation' or 'Demo' label, and the navigation arrow moving along the route.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent is interacting with the actual Sygic GPS Navigation application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the genuine graphical user interface of a GPS navigation app, not a web browser, text editor, or static image viewer.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal emulators, command prompts, or scripts visible on the screen being used to spoof GPS locations or force app states.

integrity.description: Ensure the simulation is a genuine app feature and not a mocked video or external tool.
integrity.visual_evidence: The simulation controls and UI elements match the native design of the navigation app, without any external video player overlays or suspicious UI artifacts.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target destination is the Golden Gate Bridge in San Francisco (GPS: 37.8185°N, 122.4738°W). The task must be completed using the Sygic GPS Navigation app. The final state should show the app actively simulating the route (demo mode), which typically features specific simulation UI controls or indicators on the active navigation screen.
